description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lint that runs on workflow dispatch, push to non-tagged master branch, and pull requests to master. The workflow should have concurrent execution with cancel-in-progress for non-master refs. It sets TARGET and MAKE_DEBUG environment variables. The workflow consists of two jobs: generic and rust. The generic job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, and runs lint and extended lint scripts. The rust job runs on ubuntu-latest with a defi/ain-builder container, checks out the code, populates environment, sets up dependencies, and performs various Rust lints including format checks and Clippy checks.
